summary: Fixed critical bot battle tracking bug. The frontend was missing required fields (session_id, rounds_won, rounds_lost) when calling POST /api/photo-game/bot-battle/result. Updated BattleArena.jsx to pass game data to onGameComplete callback, and PhotoGameArena.jsx to include all required fields in the API call. All 8 backend tests pass. UI verified: TappingArena shows dollar values ABOVE photos (not covered), RPSBidding shows player/opponent photos.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Bot battle result API call was missing session_id, rounds_won, rounds_lost - causing 422 validation error
FIXED: BattleArena.jsx now passes {session_id, rounds_won, rounds_lost} to onGameComplete callback
FIXED: PhotoGameArena.jsx handleAuctionBattleComplete now includes all required fields
VERIFIED: TappingArena layout - progress meters at top-20, photos at top-[38%], dollar values prominently displayed above photos
VERIFIED: RPSBidding shows player and opponent photos with actual images
VERIFIED: Bot battle stats correctly track easy_bot_wins, medium_bot_wins, etc.
VERIFIED: Difficulty unlocking works (3 easy wins unlocks medium with 20,000 BL bonus)
VERIFIED: record-round-result correctly updates stamina (-1 win, -2 loss), XP (+1 per round), and streaks
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 7 minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bot battle tracking now works correctly. After completing a bot battle, the frontend calls POST /api/photo-game/bot-battle/result with session_id, difficulty, player_won, rounds_won, rounds_lost, bet_amount. Stats are tracked in bot_battle_stats collection. User currently has 3+ easy_bot_wins (medium unlocked). TappingArena and RPSBidding UI layouts verified working.

bugs_fixed.bot_win_tracking_stuck_at_0: Fixed - frontend now sends all required fields to bot-battle/result API
bugs_fixed.meter_bar_covering_dollar_amount: Verified fixed - progress meters at top-20, photos at top-[38%]

mocked_apis.hearts_counter: Social reaction hearts counter uses mocked data (not integrated with Facebook Graph API)
